one_time_description: Loss on write-down of two CMHC housing units from net book value of $353,923 to estimated fair value of nil due to prepayment on units not expected to be obtained by the Nation
economic_notes: First Nation operates an unlicensed cannabis retail dispensary on-reserve. Operates gas station selling gasoline, tobacco, confectionary, diesel. Receives oil and gas royalties from lease agreements on designated reserve land. CMHC Phase 5 (2 units) approved for financing of $357,857. Subsequent to year-end, entered into design and build contract for community recreation centre for $2,362,000.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Audit report contains Emphasis of Matter paragraph regarding First Nation operating an unlicensed cannabis retail dispensary in non-compliance with the Cannabis Act; audit opinion not modified. Three consolidated subsidiaries: Pheasant Rump Nakota First Nation CMHC Housing, Pheasant Rump General Partner Ltd., and Pheasant Rump Master Development Limited Partnership. Financial statements submitted after the July 29, 2021 deadline (auditor report dated September 2, 2021). CMHC Phase 3 and Phase 4 term loans construction in progress with terms to be determined. Loss on write-down of two CMHC housing units of $353,923. Project management cash of $493,688 held by capital project managers for ISC-funded capital projects. Subsequent event: $2,362,000 community recreation centre construction contract entered into after year-end. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC funding and CMHC transfer.
